findings.title: Component exceeds 500-line threshold (587 lines)
findings.why_it_matters: Adding AI mode content to CurriculumComposer pushed it past the 500-line threshold. Large components are harder to test, review, and maintain.
evidence: Component grew from ~280 to 587 lines with AI mode additions. ESLint component-size/max-lines triggered. AI mode content (goal input, preview, save logic) is colocated with manual mode form fields.
findings.suggested_fix: Extract AI mode content (goal input, preview rendering, save logic) into a separate AIPathBuilder sub-component.

findings.title: AIGoalInput defined inline contributes to 640-line LearningPaths
findings.why_it_matters: AIGoalInput is defined as a local function component inside LearningPaths.tsx. Extracting it would improve testability and reduce the host component's cognitive load.
evidence: AIGoalInput is defined within LearningPaths.tsx. The file is now 640+ lines (ESLint warning). Extracting AIGoalInput would reduce by ~30 lines and improve isolation.

findings.title: Personalized wrapper duplicates AI fetch logic from original suggestPlacement
findings.why_it_matters: When preferences are ready, the wrapper makes its own API call with duplicated fetch/parse/timeout logic. If the original's API contract changes, the wrapper must be updated separately, creating a maintenance burden.
evidence: personalizedSuggestPlacement.ts lines 1235-1367 contain full fetch/post/parse/timeout logic duplicating suggestPlacement.ts. Delegates to original only when preferences unavailable.
findings.suggested_fix: Refactor suggestPathPlacement to accept an optional personalizationContext string parameter, so the wrapper only constructs the prompt augmentation.

findings.title: Personalized wrapper duplicates AI fetch logic from original suggestOrder
findings.why_it_matters: Same duplication concern as placement wrapper. The fetch/parse/timeout logic is duplicated from suggestOrder.ts.
evidence: personalizedSuggestOrder.ts lines 1075-1159 contain full fetch/post/parse/logic duplicating suggestOrder.ts.
findings.suggested_fix: Same approach: add optional personalizationContext parameter to suggestOrder.

residual_risks: If personalized wrapper API patterns diverge from originals, bugs may only appear in personalized mode
testing_gaps: No test verifying that personalized wrappers delegate correctly when preferences unavailable
No test verifying personalized wrapper API call structure matches original
